nodes.content:
# Gemini Cli

This map summarizes repository structure and important exploration paths. Start with subsystem nodes and follow evidence-backed links to inspect source files.

## Domain Clusters
- Explore [[packages-cli]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[packages-core]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[github-workflows]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[packages-a2a-server]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[docs-cli]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[packages-sdk]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[docs-assets]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[packages-vscode-ide-companion]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[gemini-skills]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[gemini-commands]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[github-actions]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[docs-tools]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[packages-devtools]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[scripts-tests]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[packages-test-utils]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[docs-reference]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.

## Explorations Needed
- Which subsystems should be prioritized for onboarding documentation?
- Which dependencies are high-risk and need version guardrails?
- Where should integration tests be expanded based on current topology?
